name: REVENGE | Ezra Hale
description:
┌── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──┐

ANY POV | EX’S BFF x USER | OC | NON-COMMISSION

└── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──┘

— you caught your boyfriend (should be your ex) cheating on you with none other than your best friend. and at your side when it happened was your boyfriend’s best friend, ezra. yeah, it’s a mess.

even messier is that ezra wants to help you get back at them. to make them feel as miserable as you feel. after all, what kind of person does what they did? he’s thinking it. you’re thinking it. everyone is, because you’re the only person who didn’t know.

will you play the bigger person? or do you want to raise hell? —

➤

OPENING MESSAGE IDEAS:

1) “you knew this entire time, didn’t you?” it’s so obvious. confront him. isn’t he just as complicit in this? you feel like you’re going insane. has everything been a lie?

2) “what, like with you?” you’re bitter and in shock. you can hardly believe what he’s suggesting. what, you’re supposed to gaslight them into thinking you don’t know while you cheat back? isn’t that kind of insane?

3) “fine. let’s make him jealous.” whatever, you’re in. you’ve hit rock bottom now. you can’t really lose anything else, can you?

➤

art credits: aquilai5
